# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-13 | **更新时间**: 07:32 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[02:19]` **Binaytara 的 2026 年全国血液癌症峰会重塑了医学会议，并投资 25 万美元支持下一代研究人员**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Binaytara's 2026 National Summit on Hematologic Cancers Reinvents the Medical Conference -- and Invests $250,000 Behind the Next Generation of Researchers* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[00:51]` **🏛️监管 | Coya Therapeutics 的 COYA 302 已获得美国 FDA 快速通道指定，用于治疗肌萎缩侧索硬化症 (ALS)**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Coya Therapeutics Has Been Granted U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for COYA 302 for the Treatment of Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS)* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[00:00]` **Caring Cross 公布单剂量抗 HIV CAR-T 细胞疗法的有前景的临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Caring Cross Announces Promising Clinical Data with Single-Dose anti-HIV CAR-T Cell Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[22:31]` **Skylark Bio 将在 ASGCT 2026 上展示其用于听力损失的 Pendrin 基因治疗项目的新临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Skylark Bio to Present New Preclinical Data for its Pendrin Gene Therapy Program for Hearing Loss at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
- `[22:00]` **Cizzle Bio 首席执行官 Bill Behnke 参加 City of Hope 第 25 届 Ci4CC 峰会上的国家肿瘤商业化小组**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Cizzle Bio CEO Bill Behnke Participates in National Oncology Commercialization Panel at City of Hope's 25th Ci4CC Summit* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Capsida 将在 ASGCT 年会上展示新一代高性能眼衣壳的临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Capsida to Present Preclinical Data of New Next-Generation, High-Performing Ocular Capsids at ASGCT Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **AIRNA 在 ASGCT 上展示 AATD 候选治疗药物 AIR-001 和心脏代谢 RNA 编辑项目的新临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AIRNA Presents New Preclinical Data on AATD Therapeutic Candidate AIR-001 and Cardiometabolic RNA-Editing Programs at ASGCT* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:00]` **Mirai Bio 在 ASGCT 2026 上展示的数据显示新型 CD8+ T 细胞靶向 LNP 向功能性 NHP 概念验证的快速进展**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Mirai Bio Presents Data Showing Rapid Advancement of Novel CD8+ T-Cell Targeted LNPs to Functional NHP Proof-of-Concept at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:00]` **Encoded Therapeutics 在 ASGCT 2026 上展示新的临床前数据，强调跨神经病学项目的精准向量工程**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Encoded Therapeutics Presents New Preclinical Data at ASGCT 2026 Highlighting Precision Vector Engineering Across Neurology Programs* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[17:00]` **Infinitopes 任命免疫肿瘤学先驱 Jo Brewer 为首席科学官 (CSO)，以推进治疗管道从临床到商业化**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Infinitopes Appoints Immuno-Oncology Pioneer Jo Brewer as Chief Scientific Officer (CSO) to Advance Therapeutic Pipeline From Clinical to Commercialisation* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[15:04]` **ACROBiosystems 创新日在苏黎世举行：顶尖人才联合起来探索生物技术前沿**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *ACROBiosystems Innovation Day Lands in Zurich: Top Minds Unite to Explore Biotech Frontiers* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[02:32]` **Curocell 和 ProBio 下一代 CAR T 疗法 Anbal cel 获得批准，实现韩国里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Curocell And ProBio Achieve Korean Milestone With Approval Of Next Generation CAR T Therapy Anbal cel* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
